description: Template for punk/indie music posts - live shows, DIY culture, raw energy

data.label: Style
data.name: Comic Ink + Raw Punk Energy
data.description: Heavy ink illustration. Bold black outlines, high contrast chiaroscuro with deep blacks and stark highlights. Cel-shaded shadows, graphic shapes. High contrast B&W with earth tone pops (brown, rust, ochre). Hand-drawn comic book aesthetic with raw, DIY energy. Influenced by Los Bros Hernandez and Paul Pope. NOT photorealistic. Edge-to-edge composition.

data.label: Setting
data.description: Underground rock club, small venue stage, DIY show space with raw lighting
